{"type":"flowgraph","mermaid":"graph TD TopBar["Top Bar
(brand, nav, login/logout)"] Content["Content area (swapped by the router)
- Workspace (#/Home)
- Login (#/Login)
- About (#/About)
- Documentation (#/Documentation)"] BottomBar["Bottom Bar
(footer links)"] TopBar --> Content Content --> BottomBar ","style":"notebook"}
